notes.production_accepted_is_false: Turso dependency is added and fail-closed logic is implemented, but Turso is not actually connected in the current deployment environment. Production acceptance requires a verified Turso connection on Vercel with environment variables TURSO_DATABASE_URL and TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN set in production.
notes.safe_for_beta_progress_is_false: The persistence layer is now safe (fail-closed, no data loss), but Turso is not yet connected. Beta progress will only be persistent once Turso credentials are configured in Vercel production environment.
next_steps: Set TURSO_DATABASE_URL and TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN in Vercel production environment
Deploy to Vercel and verify GET /health/persistence returns backend=turso
Run persistence integration test against production
If Turso connects successfully, update production_accepted to true
Consider adding lessons 5-5 (file I/O) and 5-6 (classes/OOP) in a future layer
